title: All The Fish Data Pack
description: A data pack that adds over 150 unique fish to the fishing loot pool.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cCEmuRnetks" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Introducing All The Fish: A fishing data pack that adds over 150 unique fish to the fishing loot pool featured in the main [Barely Default Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/barely-default-data-pack). Many of the fish are inspired by popular games like Terraria and Animal Crossing, hopefully catching the eye of the respected fans.

The most recent beta version adds the functionality to fish in **lava**!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yLMrHJa2VIM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The fish that can be caught are now determined by location, time of day and weather dependencies. Explore your world and fish in different biomes throughout the day and night - do you think you can catch them all?

Make sure to download the required resource pack to see all the spectacular fish: [AllTheFish - Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/allthefish-resource-pack)
